MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion For Protective Order is Denied. Defendant's deposition shall proceed on a date to be agreed upon by counsel after meet and confer. The deposition shall proceed even as it shall be on a date less than 30 days prior to the trial date. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
